title: Four arrested for murders in Pacaltsdorp
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Pacaltsdorp police arrested four suspects in two unrelated incidents in Sarah Crescent, Rosedale this weekend.

In the the first incident a suspect (37) was arrested after he allegedly stabbed his brother (34) to death last night, Saturday 25 May. According the Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies, it is believed that the two brothers had an altercation before the incident occurred.


> The victim sustained multiple stab wounds to the body and was declared dead by paramedics on scene.


The suspect was later arrested on a murder charge. He remains in custody and is expected to appear in the George Magistrates court tomorrow, Monday 27 May.

Meanwhile, three suspects were arrested in connection with the murder of another man in the early hours of this morning, Sunday 26 May.

According to Spies the victim's body was found with multiple injuries.

"The victim was declared dead by paramedics on scene. Circumstances surrounding this incident are under investigation. The trio is facing a murder charge each. They will appear in court once charged," said Spies.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
